nasb.text: and he fell to the ground and heard a voice saying to him, “Saul, Saul, why are you persecuting Me?”

esv.text: And falling to the ground, he heard a voice saying to him, “Saul, Saul, why are you persecuting me?”

cnv.text: 他仆倒在地，聽見有聲音對他說：“掃羅，掃羅！你為甚麼迫害我？”

ccb.text: 他倒在地上，听见有声音对他说：“扫罗！扫罗！你为什么迫害我？”

csbs.text: 他仆倒在地上，听见有声音对他说：“扫罗，扫罗！你为什么逼迫我？”
